Remote execution server initialized and get the data (staged or from external source)</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 16px;">4. Run the function and return result(s)</span></p><p><span style="font-size: 16px;">5. p.span: 3. Remote execution server initialized and get the data (staged or from external source)
4. Run the function and return result(s)
5. Send the result(s) back to the user
